description_long: This is a British InterCity 125 locomotive, characterized by its streamlined, aerodynamic nose and distinctive yellow and black livery. The body is primarily black with a yellow front and undercarriage, and it features the 'InterCity 125' branding and British Rail logo on the side. The locomotive has a series of roof vents and grilles for engine cooling, and the windows are concentrated at the front cab area, with no visible passenger windows along the sides. The undercarriage includes detailed bogies, wheels, and coupling mechanisms, while the front and rear both have buffer and coupling systems. The overall design is robust, built for high-speed intercity travel, and the exterior is made of metal panels with some plastic and glass components.
description: A streamlined British InterCity 125 locomotive with a yellow and black color scheme, featuring a prominent cab, roof vents, and detailed undercarriage. The train is marked with 'InterCity 125' branding and has a robust, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow nose, cab windows, headlights, and front coupling/buffer details.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the 'InterCity 125' branding, British Rail logo, roof vents, and the full length of the locomotive.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back coupling, buffer system, and rear access panel with minimal window presence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side profile, undercarriage, and roof details.
attribute_window_arrangement: windows only at the cab area
